content: One more piece on this — we have a coding scheme document that the team developed early in the study, it's the lookup we use for mapping these open responses onto our analytical categories. It's a PDF, about thirty pages, with the category definitions and exemplar quotes. Could the system reference that document when it's labelling the responses, so the categories are aligned with what we've already published? I can share the file. We've been doing it manually for the published work so far but if we can automate the alignment for this next wave it would save the team weeks.
